headline: CAVA's KDS Rollout Boosts Digital Accuracy: Can Tech Drive Traffic?
summary: CAVA is scaling its kitchen display system to sharpen digital execution, improving order accuracy and giving guests clearer visibility into order status.

headline: Here's How Much a $1000 Investment in Chipotle Mexican Grill Made 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
summary: Investing in certain stocks can pay off in the long run, especially if you hold on for a decade or more.

headline: CHIPOTLE KICKS OFF THE SUMMER SEASON WITH THE RETURN OF HIGHLY POPULAR CHIPOTLE HONEY CHICKEN
summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE: CMG) today announced the return of Chipotle Honey Chicken, which debuted in 2025 as the brand's best-performing limited-time offering and quickly became a fan favorite, driving record demand. The protein will be available in restaurants across the U.S., Canada, the U.K., France and Germany beginning April 28.

headline: Raymond James Maintains Outperform on Chipotle Mexican Grill, Lowers Price Target to $41
summary: Raymond James  analyst Brian Vaccaro   maintains Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $43 to $41.
